title: Inheritance Order of UX Widget IncludeScript
breadcrumbs: Inheritance Order of UX Widget IncludeScript
text: Inheritance Order of UX Widget IncludeScript For a UX Widget that includes the IncludeScript widget property definition, the corresponding IncludeScript fragments are added to the component by the compiler. If multiple definitions of ProcScript modules and #define declarations are present, the Uniface compiler follows the inheritance precedence order. The precedence order for IncludeScript is as follows: IncludeScript defined locally in the component IncludeScript defined in the model In the subtype entities In the supertype entities IncludeScript defined using the physical widget definition properties The diagram below shows the IncludeScript precedence order for Field, Entity, and Component. For more information, see Inheritance . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
